title: Would like to be able to change colour of form

posts.author: Penny (Penny Murray)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am planning to use a Monday.com FORM on our website as a CONTACT US form.

The only issue is I have very little control over the way that form looks. It does NOT match our style on the website.
I can only change the background.
I would like to be able to change the following:

  1. Form colour
  2. Positioning of the button
  3. Label on the button
